CREATE TABLE test_struct (data STRUCT<i: INT, s: STRING>);
INSERT INTO test_struct VALUES (ROW(3, 'example'));
SELECT data.i FROM test_struct;
SELECT data.s FROM test_struct;
SELECT (ROW(1, ROW(2, 'nested'))).1;
CREATE TABLE test_structs (id INT, info STRUCT<a: INT, b: STRING>);
INSERT INTO test_structs VALUES (1, ROW(100, 'hello')), (2, ROW(200, 'world'));
SELECT info.a FROM test_structs;
SELECT info.b FROM test_structs WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (ROW(ROW(3, 'test'), ROW(10, 'value'))).1.1;
CREATE TABLE users (id INT, details STRUCT<name: STRING, age: INT>);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, ROW('Alice', 30)), (2, ROW('Bob', 25));
SELECT details.name FROM users WHERE details.age > 28;
SELECT details.age + 5 FROM users;
SELECT (SELECT details.name FROM users WHERE id = 1).name;
SELECT ROW(ROW(5, 'inner'), NULL).1;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, item STRUCT<name: STRING, price: FLOAT>);
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1, ROW('item1', 10.5)), (2, ROW('item2', 20.0));
SELECT item.name FROM orders WHERE item.price > 15.0;
SELECT (SELECT item FROM orders WHERE order_id = 1).name;
SELECT (ROW(STRUCT<field1: INT, field2: STRING>(1, 'value')).field1 + 2) AS calculated_field;
